price: bleiben wird (nur) das Angesicht deines Herrn, Besitzer der Erhabenheit und Ehre.
arabic: وَيَبۡقَىٰ وَجۡهُ رَبِّكَ ذُو ٱلۡجَلَٰلِ وَٱلۡإِكۡرَامِ

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: wayabqā wajhu rabbika dhū al-jalāli wal-ik'rāmi
